mapper.select: SELECT q.*, c.course_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM t_question q LEFT JOIN t_course c ON q.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN t_teacher t ON q.teacher_id = t.teacher_id WHERE q.question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_question (course_id, question_type, content, answer, analysis, difficulty, teacher_id, create_time) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{questionType}, #{content}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{difficulty}, #{teacherId}, #{createTime})
